root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) as age_mem , decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,null,null,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)) as id_card , decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone,null,(select address.telephone from sc_mem_m_member_address address where address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and address.address_type = '1'),sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone) as telephone , sysdate from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_member_address where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '049898' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = '010101' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
